title: Omalotheca nanchuanensis
taxonomy: Omalotheca nanchuanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Omalotheca which is a group of flowering plants. Omalotheca nanchuanensis is classified as a member of the class Magnoliopsida, the subclass Asteridae, and the order Asterales. The species is further classified under the family Asteraceae, subfamily Carduoideae, and tribe Cardueae. This classification helps to group Omalotheca nanchuanensis with other related species in the plant kingdom.
